## REACTIONS
- I notice the excitement in the library when I see Star Wars posters on the walls.
- I observe the librarian's smile when she helps me check out this intriguing book.
- I read about Darth Vader's rise to power and the rebellion against the Empire.
- I feel conflicted when learning of Luke Skywalker's sacrifice and Han Solo's loss.
